name: Hot and Spicy Noodles with Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok over medium-high heat, heat rice wine until it bubbles.
2. Add ginger and garlic, then carrots and broccoli. Stir-fry the vegetables for about five minutes until the carrots soften slightly.
3. Add cabbage and green onions; cover and cook for three more minutes.
4. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the cooked vegetables to a platter and set aside.
5. Return the wok to medium-high heat. Add water, sesame oil, up to 1/2 teaspoon cayenne pepper, honey (if using), and hoisin sauce (if desired). Stir-fry until it bubbles.
6. Add the cooked rice noodles and stir-fry until they are heated through.
7. Return the vegetables to the wok and stir-fry them briefly with the noodles.
8. Season with soy sauce to taste.
Note: The sesame oil enhances the flavor of this dish, but you can omit it if you prefer to reduce fat intake.
